summaryAm: የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው በደስታ ሲሮጥ መስማትና መመለስን የሚማርበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: መጫወት ደስ ይላል፣ ግን ደህንነትን መስማት ይበልጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንዲት እናት የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው ጋገረች።
pages.textEn: A mother baked a gingerbread man.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 1: አንዲት እናት የዝንጅብል እንጀራ ሰው ጋገረች።

pages.textEn: The gingerbread man jumped happily from the tray and said he would run.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 2: እንጀራው በደስታ ከመድቡ ወጥቶ “እሮጣለሁ!” አለ።

pages.textAm: በጓሮ ውስጥ ዶሮ፣ ድመት እና ልጆች በሳቅ ተከተሉት።
pages.textEn: In the yard, a chicken, a cat, and children followed him with laughter.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 3: በጓሮ ውስጥ ዶሮ፣ ድመት እና ልጆች በሳቅ ተከተሉት።

pages.textAm: ወንዝ አጠገብ ሲደርስ ቆመ፣ መሻገር እንደማይችል ተረዳ።
pages.textEn: When he reached the river, he stopped and understood he could not cross safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 4: ወንዝ አጠገብ ሲደርስ ቆመ፣ መሻገር እንደማይችል ተረዳ።

pages.textAm: አንድ ደግ ልጅ “ወደ ቤት እንመለስ፤ በዚያ በደህና እንጫወታለን” አለ።
pages.textEn: A kind child suggested returning home where they could play safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 5: አንድ ደግ ልጅ “ወደ ቤት እንመለስ፤ በዚያ በደህና እንጫወታለን” አለ።

pages.textAm: እንጀራው ተመለሰ፣ ሁሉም በቤት ውስጥ ዘፈኑ እና በደስታ ተጫወቱ።
pages.textEn: The gingerbread man returned, and everyone sang and played happily indoors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Gingerbread Man, page 6: እንጀራው ተመለሰ፣ ሁሉም በቤት ውስጥ ዘፈኑ እና በደስታ ተጫወቱ።

pages.textAm: እንጀራው በጓሮ ውስጥ ሲሮጥ ነፋሱ ቀስ ብሎ አገፋው። “በደስታ መሮጥ ደስ ይላል፣ ግን መንገዴን ማወቅ አለብኝ” አለ።
pages.textEn: The gingerbread man enjoyed running but remembered to know his path.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gingerbread man running happily through a sunny yard.

pages.textAm: ዶሮዋ “ቀስ በል፣ እንጀራ ጓደኛ” ብላ ጮኸች። ድመቷም “ከእኛ ጋር በደህና እንጫወት” አለች።
pages.textEn: The chicken and cat called for him to slow down and play safely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken and cat kindly calling to a gingerbread man in a yard.

pages.textAm: ወንዙ ሲያበራ እንጀራው ውሃውን ተመለከተ። “ብቻዬን መሻገር ጥሩ አይደለም” ብሎ ቆመ።
pages.textEn: At the bright river, he stopped and chose not to cross alone.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gingerbread man stopping safely beside a bright river.

pages.textAm: ልጆቹ በቅጠል ላይ ትንሽ ድልድይ አሳዩት፣ ግን መጀመሪያ አዋቂን መጠየቅ እንዳለባቸው ተስማሙ።
pages.textEn: The children agreed they should ask a grown-up before crossing.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children and a gingerbread man looking at a small bridge near a river.

pages.textAm: በቤት ውስጥ ሁሉም ትንሽ የሩጫ ጨዋታ አዘጋጁ። እንጀራውም መስማት ጨዋታን የበለጠ ደህና እንደሚያደርግ ተማረ።
pages.textEn: Back home, everyone made a safe running game, and he learned to listen.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Gingerbread man and children playing a safe indoor running game.
